transcript: He said I'll love you 'til I die...

Dear George, I was sitting in my office the other day, and I was thinkin' about the days that gone by, rememberin' the good times you and I had had, and tryin' to avoid the bad. Over and over again I kept wonderin', what would life be like should the Lord come today and take my good friend George Jones off into the night? I kept tellin' myself, why, it couldn't be, but knowin' all along that it is surely sooner than I would believe. So I wrote a last message to my good buddy George, and it's one that I think you oughta listen to. One that you sure need to hear. It goes something like this...
Plenty of us go through life worrying and fretting because we don't have "regular" bowel movements.
The most important thing to remember about a normal bowel is that your own pattern is normal for you. Some people have bowel action after every meal. Some have it as rarely as once a week.

Lack of daily bowel action does not harm your health. It does not cause pimples, acne, or other facial blemishes. It does not cause cancer, or growths in the intestines, nor any other disease. Your bowel will move when it's ready to.
It's so hard watchin' ya, for I'd really like to see ya stick around a while. Can ya hear me, George? Can ya hear me? Don't leave me. 'Cause I sure love you, George. This is your old friend, Roy.
